# Drop

> Drop is an iOS app for discovering EDM concerts, festivals, and club nights — every event in one place, with one-tap official ticket links and price comparison across sellers. Releasing soon.

Drop is built by Resonance Ventures LLC. Primary site: https://trydropapp.com

## Pages

- [Home](https://trydropapp.com/): what Drop does, launch access signup
- [Get the app / links](https://trydropapp.com/link): app links, launch list, social
- [Privacy Policy](https://trydropapp.com/privacy)
- [Terms of Service](https://trydropapp.com/terms)

## Contact

- TikTok: [@trydropapp](https://tiktok.com/@trydropapp)
